titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 24: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 24. (A.R. No. 259 of 1923.) KŌYIL-TĒVARĀYAṈPĒṬṬAI, PAPANASAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Matsyapurīśvara temple.

This inscription records the grant of three pieces of land after purchase by an individual Tiruvaḍigaḷ Aiyanaḍi of Śiruvēḷūr in Iḷaiyūr-nāḍu on the southern bank of the river (Kāvēri) and endowed the same for various purposes to the god, Tiruchchelūr Mahādēvar at Rājakēsari-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.

He purchased the first piece from several individuals of Maṉōramachchēri in Rājakēsari-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and endowed the same for supplying an uri of oil daily for burning a perpetual lamp and also for providing food offerings during the early morning and midday services to the god.
The second piece of land had been purchased during the eighth regnal year of Rājakēsarivarmaṉ (Sundarachōḷa ?) for maintaining a garden for the temple.

The third plot of land had been purchased from Sāvandi Nārāyaṇaṉ and gifted for the sake of providing flowers in exchange for a plot of four mā which was probably already in the enjoyment of the temple for the same purpose.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 139.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu teṉkarai brahmadeyam śrīrājakesaricaturvetimaṅgalattu
tiruccelūr mahādevarkku vecālippāṭit teṉkarai Iḷaiyūr nāṭṭuc ciṟuvelūrc ciṟuvelūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvaṭikaḷ Aiyyaṉaṭi
tirunontā viḷakku [ 1- ṟu] kku cantirātittavaṟ nittam Uriy Eṇṇaikkum ciṟukālait tiruvamutu nānāḻiyaricikkum Uccampotu nānāḻikkum neyyamutukkum ta
yiramutum kaṟiyamutum Aṭaikkāyamutukkumāka Ivvirāja kesariccaturvedimaṅgalattu maṉoramacceri Aruvalattu vārakkiyaṉ Ī
śvaraṉ centaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Īśvaraṉ nakkaṉum Icceri Ātaṉūr pālāciriyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ tattaṉum Ivaṉ tampi nārāyaṇaṉ tattaṉum Ivaṉ tampi nārā
yaṇaṉ kāṭaṉum marutūr pālāciriyaṉ tāyaṉ kaāḷiyum Ivvaṉaivar pakkalum nāṉvilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilam kāmatevavati
kkuk kiḻakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu maṉoramavāykkālukku vaṭakku mutalcatirattu Īśvaraṉ centaṉ tattapirāṉbhaṭṭar pakka
lum Ivvaṉaivar pakkalumāka vilai ¬4vum kovirājakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 8 vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrīviranārāyaṇaccaturveti maṅka
lattu cūracūḷāmaṇicceri Aruvalattu vārakkiyaṉ Ātittaṉ sūryaṉṉiṭai vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam ¿4yumāka Iccatiram �vum Itutiruva
ṭikaḷ(ṭi) Aiyyaṉaṭiye vacca tirunantavāṉam tirupaḷḷittāmattukkut tirumañcuṇavaḻi
kku merkkum peruvaḻikkut teṟkum nārāyaṇaṉ kāṭaṉ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum śrīrvvatattiṉ nilat
tukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam pūnantavāṉat teṟkaṭaiyak kiṇaṟuṭpaṭa nāṉmāvukkum nāṉ pariva
rttaṉaiyāl kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivūr naratoṅkavatikku merkkum Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu cikaṇṭavāykkālukku teṟku 1- catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiñca muṟṟumāvi
l meṟkaṭaiya nān Iṭaiyāṟṟukkuṭi cāvānti tattanārāyaṇan pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilam ṅa4yum ma(ā)hāsabhaiyārum panmāheśvararum rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
